positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_ko_stock
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    ~stock(ko)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~bought_for_rapid_appreciation(ko)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    suitable_for_retirement_fund(ko)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0) | ~bought_for_rapid_appreciation(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    stock(sK0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~growth_stock(X0) | bought_for_rapid_appreciation(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    growth_stock(sK0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    mature_stock(ko)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~mature_stock(X0) | suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    bought_for_rapid_appreciation(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:

cnf(u23,axiom,

cnf(u22,axiom,
    suitable_for_retirement_fund(ko)).

cnf(u17,axiom,

    ~mature_stock(X0) | suitable_for_retirement_fund(X0)).
